name: Mitra Energy Limited
description: Mitra Energy Limited was an oil and gas exploration and production company focused on assets in Southeast Asia, including the Philippines, Vietnam, and Indonesia. Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, the company maintained support offices across the region to manage its exploration, appraisal, and pre-development activities. Mitra Energy Limited later underwent a strategic shift and rebranded as Jadestone Energy Inc., transitioning its focus toward becoming a significant player in the regional energy sector. The company was previously listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol MEA.
